_note: Capability records for the billing class, ready to merge into platform/registry/capabilities.json (append to the capabilities[] array). Same shape as existing entries. Parent session performs the merge.

capabilities.backing_service: local fs (invoice generation); payment provider OPEN — PayPal vs Stripe vs GoDaddy, no provider wired
manual_steps: Choose payment provider (PayPal vs Stripe vs GoDaddy) before any send/charge
Render PDF from markdown (stubbed, no renderer wired)
Deliver invoice to client (email/portal send not implemented)
Generate payable link / collect payment (requires chosen provider credentials)

capabilities.backing_service: local fs (billing ledger); payment confirmation is manual — no provider reconciliation
manual_steps: Verify funds actually landed — paid state is manually asserted, not provider-reconciled
Automatic paid detection requires chosen provider webhook/credentials (OPEN)
